This era witnessed a flourishing of art, poetry, and philosophy, where famous literary figures such as Li Bai created enduring masterpieces. It remains remembered as a high point of imperial power and cosmopolitan openness in the region.<|im_end|>

This era witnessed a flourishing of art, poetry, and philosophy, where famous literary figures such as Li Bai created enduring masterpieces. Economically, the population surged and infrastructure improved, fostering widespread innovation in technology and ceramics. It remains remembered as a high point of imperial power and cosmopolitan openness in the region.<|im_end|>
